---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Obsession Tracker
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Device**: [e.g. iPhone 15 Pro, Pixel 8]
- **OS Version**: [e.g. iOS 18.2, Android 15]
- **App Version**: [e.g. 2.2.0 (265)]
- **Build Type**: [Release / Debug / TestFlight / Beta]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Privacy Note

Please do NOT include GPS coordinates, photos, or other personal location data
in bug reports. If a bug involves location data, describe the general scenario
without sharing actual coordinates.
